videos.headline: Notre Dame's fumble recovery leads to a TD
videos.description: Audric Estime leaps over the goal line following the Irish's fumble recovery, giving them a 38-14 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's fumble recovery leads to a TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye connects with Josh Downs for a UNC TD
videos.description: Drake Maye lofts a pass to Josh Downs who comes down with the catch to give UNC the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One Play (Drake Maye connects with Josh Downs for a UNC TD) 2022/09/24

videos.headline: Pyne connects with Mayer for Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Drew Pyne connects with Michael Mayer for the 10-yard touchdown as Notre Dame evens it up at 7-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pyne connects with Mayer for Notre Dame TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pyne connects with Styles to put Notre Dame ahead
videos.description: Drew Pyne connects with Lorenzo Styles for the 30-yard score as Notre Dame takes a 14-7 lead vs. UNC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pyne connects with Styles to put Notre Dame ahead) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Downs' 2nd TD of the day ties it up for UNC
videos.description: Josh Downs catches his second touchdown of the day as North Carolina ties it at 14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Downs' 2nd TD of the day ties it up for UNC) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Audric Estime pounds it in for the Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Audric Estime pounds it in for the Notre Dame touchdown as they take a 21-14 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Audric Estime pounds it in for the Notre Dame TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drew Pyne finds a wide-open Logan Diggs for a Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Logan Diggs hauls in the rock and walks into the end zone to extend the Fighting Irish's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drew Pyne finds a wide-open Logan Diggs for a Notre Dame TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye connects with Antoine Green for an 80-yard UNC TD
videos.description: Antoine Green hauls in the dime from Drake Maye for an 80-yard touchdown to pull the Tar Heels closer.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Maye connects with Antoine Green for an 80-yard UNC TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chris Tyree plows into the end zone to extend Notre Dame's lead
videos.description: Chris Tyree muscles past the goal line to give the Fighting Irish a 45-20 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chris Tyree plows into the end zone to extend Notre Dame's lead) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Omarion Hampton dives for the pylon to pull UNC closer
videos.description: Omarion Hampton gathers the rock and dives for the pylon for a Tar Heels touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Omarion Hampton dives for the pylon to pull UNC closer) 2022/09/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye and Antoine Green connect for their 2nd TD
videos.description: Drake Maye airs out a 64-yard dime to  Antoine Green to pull the Tar Heels closer late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Maye and Antoine Green connect for their 2nd TD) 2022/09/24 ESHEET
